cv.title: Business Management Student
cv.summary: Motivated second-year Business Management student seeking part-time retail or admin roles. Strong communicator with society leadership experience and proven ability to balance studies with customer-facing work.

bullets: Assisted customers and organised stock on busy Saturday shifts
Processed donations and maintained tidy shop floor displays
Managed society budget of £2,400 and reported to 80+ members
Organised two careers events with local employers
